A '''species''' of [[Bone/Legends|boneless]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] with [[Crystal/Legends|crystalline]] eyes existed during the [[Time/Legends|time]] after the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. They spoke through their prehensile trunks. These trunks had fine tendrils at the ends, and members of the [[Species/Legends|species]] had at least five trunks. They formed a colony on [[Chalcedon/Legends|Chalcedon]], and were its bureaucrats. One member of the species, who worked in the center of a glass building for a strange water pool, was known as [[the Indexer]].<ref name="Crystal Star" />
